meaning: n.石冢,石堆纪念碑,堆石界标
examples: He passed a cairn of stones that once had been a chimney, and a dry well covered with a slab of the tin so rusty it served as more warning than a safeguard.
A Cairn terrier called Terry played the role of the dog Toto.
Cairn plugged and abandoned both Wells as the summer drilling season ended.
The intention is to move to 58% Vedanta ownership, while Cairn Energy reduces to 22%.
The acquisition will be covered by a combination of about 43% cash and 57% Cairn shares.
